title: Governo de Goiás amplia capacidade de armazenagem para acompanhar produção de grãos
role_in_benchmark: Context calibration: Goiás storage capacity 17.5 Mt in 695 units and production 36.9 Mt in 2024/25, motivating peak-pressure regimes.

title: SOJA – AGRO EM DADOS / JULHO 2025
role_in_benchmark: Context calibration: Goiás soybean production 20.4 Mt versus state storage capacity around 17.5 Mt, motivating outbound pressure and appointment scarcity.

title: Diesel e safrinha 'cheia' vão sustentar os preços do frete - ESALQ-LOG
role_in_benchmark: Context calibration: freight pressure and route Rio Verde-Santos used to motivate costly waiting and logistics stress.

title: Pagamento do Tempo Adicional de Carga e Descarga - ANTT
role_in_benchmark: Legal calibration: 5-hour statutory wait limit and 2025 compensation update (R$ 2.41 per ton-hour) used in overwait penalty fields.

title: Lei nº 11.442/2007 - Planalto
role_in_benchmark: Legal calibration: establishes 5-hour maximum load/unload waiting reference after arrival.

title: Obter Informações sobre a Rede Armazenadora Brasileira - Sicarm
role_in_benchmark: Structural calibration: Sicarm is the official source for units and storage infrastructure.

title: Rede Armazenadora da Conab
role_in_benchmark: Operational calibration: Conab storage units provide weighing, cleaning, drying and storage services; benchmark keeps weighing, inspection/classification and unloading as the v1 core stages.

title: ARMAZENAGEM - Norma da Conab (PDF)
role_in_benchmark: Operational calibration: explicit mention that reception, processing and expedition depend on equipment flow and that trucks are queued by arrival/FIFO in the unit.

title: The generalized flexible job shop scheduling problem
role_in_benchmark: Methodological calibration: richer FJSP constraints and benchmark-oriented dataset design.

title: Greedy randomized adaptive search for dynamic flexible job-shop scheduling
role_in_benchmark: Methodological calibration: dynamic events such as new orders, due-date changes, machine breakdowns and urgent orders.

title: Intelligent scheduling method for multi-machine cooperative operation based on NSGA-III and improved ant colony algorithm
role_in_benchmark: Analog domain calibration: agricultural scheduling with harvester/grain truck coordination under location, time-window and path constraints.

title: Cross-Dock Trailer Scheduling with Workforce Constraints dataset (640 instances) - Zenodo
role_in_benchmark: Benchmark packaging inspiration: instance-family structure with multiple CSV files per scenario.

title: Problem instances for integrated truck and workforce scheduling problem - Zenodo
role_in_benchmark: Benchmark packaging inspiration: XS/S/M/L scaling families for truck-centric logistics problems.

title: Gurobi Python tupledict reference
role_in_benchmark: Implementation calibration: tuple-indexed data layout for variables and coefficients.

title: Gurobi Python addVars and multidict reference
role_in_benchmark: Implementation calibration: loader organized for addVars-style tuple keys.

title: Gurobi multidict reference
role_in_benchmark: Implementation calibration: optional conversion to multidict/tupledict objects.
